username.description: ConfigCat Public Management API Basic auth username (not secret).

password.description: ConfigCat Public Management API Basic auth password. Used only for Basic auth; never logged.

base_url.description: ConfigCat API base URL override for tests or proxies.

config_id.description: ConfigCat config id; required for the config, settings, deleted_settings, and setting/sdk_keys/config_setting_values detail streams (the latter two also require environment_id).

environment_id.description: ConfigCat environment id; required for the environment, sdk_keys, and config_setting_values detail streams.

setting_id.description: ConfigCat setting (feature flag) id; required for the setting detail stream.

segment_id.description: ConfigCat segment id; required for the segment detail stream.

webhook_id.description: ConfigCat webhook id; required for the webhook detail stream.

permission_group_id.description: ConfigCat permission group id; required for the permission_group detail stream.

integration_id.description: ConfigCat integration id; required for the integration detail stream.

proxy_profile_id.description: ConfigCat proxy profile id; required for the proxy_profile detail stream.

organization_id.description: ConfigCat organization id; required for the proxy_profiles and members streams.

product_id.description: ConfigCat product id; required for the integrations and stale_flags detail streams (the configs/environments/tags/segments/webhooks/permission_groups/audit_logs streams instead fan out across every product automatically).

audit_log_config_id.description: Optional configId query filter for the audit_logs stream.

audit_log_environment_id.description: Optional environmentId query filter for the audit_logs stream.

tag_id.description: ConfigCat tag id; required for the tag detail stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
